artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of an impossibly tall filing cabinet vanishing upward into hazy ivory dark, its endless drawers slightly ajar leaking cold cyan arcane glow, paper counters and blank smudged slips drifting around it like snow, lonely municipal light pooling at its base, the object monolithic and quietly menacing yet tender, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Infinite Filing Cabinet
text:
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, file it: put a paper counter on The Infinite Filing Cabinet.
{2}, {T}, Remove three paper counters: Draw two cards.
{4}, {T}, Remove seven paper counters: Take an extra turn after this one to "get caught up on filing."
flavorText: Drawer A through Drawer ∞. Drawer ∞ is where they keep the things that never happened.
